creator: long@njl.materials.ox.ac.uk
text:
Make world completed but on checking date/times of installed binaries
I noticed that /usr/bin/genclass was the original 2.2-GAMMA versions
-r-xr-xr-x  1 bin  bin  10238 Feb 15 19:13 /usr/bin/genclass

I logged the entire make and in the install phase it would appear that the 
install did not work even though there are no errors.

How-To-Repeat: 
	Sorry, make world took 42 hours (old PC).
